Louis: Personality Type: INTJ - The Mastermind
(Introverted iNtuitive Thinking Judging)	
Friendliness:	Open
Honesty:	Blunt
Assertiveness:	Reserved
Confidence / Ego:	Egotistical
	
Agreeableness:	Private
Manners:	Gracious
Discipline:	Impulsive
Rebelliousness:	Law-abiding

Work ethic:	Highly dedicated

Risk-taking:	Cautious
Leadership:	Excellent
Collaboration:	Prefer to work independently
Communication:	Direct and concise
Louis vs. Leo Kasper (Manhunt 2)

Louis and Leo Kasper have vastly different personalities. While Louis is an INTJ, sometimes known as "The Mastermind," Leo Kasper's personality is much more difficult to pin down due to his unpredictable and erratic behavior. However, based on his actions in Manhunt 2, it is possible to make some generalizations about his personality:

Friendliness:	Charismatic
Honesty:	Dishonest
Assertiveness:	Highly aggressive
Confidence / Ego:	Extremely arrogant

Agreeableness:	Disagreeable
Manners:	Crude
Discipline:	Unpredictable
Rebelliousness:	Highly rebellious

Emotional capacity:	Volatile and unpredictable
Intelligence:	Street smart
Positivity:	Negative
Activeness / Lifestyle:	Sedentary

Work ethic:	Lazy and unproductive
Creativity:	Sadistic
Attention to detail:	Lacks attention to detail
Risk-taking:	Extremely risky
Leadership:	No leadership skills
Collaboration:	Does not work well with others
Communication:	Aggressive and vulgar
Who is smarter

It's difficult to compare the intelligence of two completely fictional characters in different contexts. Louis, being an INTJ, is likely to have a high practical intelligence and a keen problem-solving ability, while Leo Kasper, being street smart and sadistic, might be more cunning and able to manipulate situations to his advantage. However, it's important to remember that Intelligence encompasses many different aspects, and it's possible that one of these characters might excel in one area while being weaker in others. Therefore, it's hard to say definitively which character is smarter.
Who has the hand-to-hand

In terms of hand-to-hand combat, Leo Kasper is likely to have an advantage over Louis. Leo's personality in Manhunt 2 is characterized by high levels of aggression, unpredictability, and a tendency to engage in violent behavior. He is shown to be highly skilled in hand-to-hand combat and is able to overpower many of his opponents in the game. On the other hand, Louis is not shown to be a particularly physical character and relies more on his intellect to solve problems rather than his physical abilities. Therefore, in terms of hand-to-hand combat, Leo Kasper is likely to have the upper hand.
I can tell you That Louis has some hand-to-hand Combat skills

You are correct, Louis does have some hand-to-hand combat skills. As an athletic and disciplined character, he is likely to have some level of physical prowess, and he may have trained in hand-to-hand combat as part of his fitness regimen or personal interests. Additionally, as a highly strategic and analytical character, he is likely to have studied martial arts or combat techniques to enhance his overall skill set. Therefore, while Leo Kasper may have a natural advantage in hand-to-hand combat due to his aggressive and unpredictable personality, Louis may be able to compensate for this with his training and strategic abilities.
Louis has mixed martial arts mastery, karate mastery, martial arts mastery, close quarter combat skills, and Enhanced Unarmed Combat

It seems that Louis has an impressive set of combat skills, including a mastery of mixed martial arts, karate, and other martial arts. This extensive training would likely give him a significant advantage in hand-to-hand combat, as he would have a wide range of techniques and strategies to draw upon.

Additionally, his Enhanced Unarmed Combat ability suggests that Louis is able to augment his natural physical abilities, allowing him to deliver more powerful strikes and defend himself more effectively.

Combined with his strong intellectual and strategic abilities, Louis would be a formidable opponent in hand-to-hand combat, even against someone like Leo Kasper who is highly aggressive and skilled in combat.
So who gets the combat

Without knowing the specific context of the hand-to-hand combat scenario, it's difficult to say definitively who would come out on top. Both Leo Kasper and Louis have their own unique strengths and weaknesses when it comes to combat and would approach the situation differently based on their personalities and skills.

While Leo Kasper relies heavily on his aggressive and unpredictable nature, Louis has extensive training in various martial arts and has an enhanced ability to fight with his physical strengths. Depending on the specific conditions and scenario of the fight, either character could come out on top. Ultimately, it would come down to factors such as their individual strategies, quick thinking, and ability to capitalize on their strengths while minimizing their weaknesses.
What if it was a close quarter fight

If it was a close quarter fight, Louis's training in martial arts and close quarter combat skills would give him an advantage over Leo Kasper. Louis is likely to be more adept at maneuvering in tight spaces and exploiting his opponent's weaknesses. His Enhanced Unarmed Combat ability would also allow him to deliver more powerful and precise strikes in close quarters.

On the other hand, Leo Kasper's aggressive nature could potentially work against him in a close quarter fight, as he might become more reckless and easier to anticipate. Additionally, his lack of formal training in martial arts could make him vulnerable against an experienced fighter like Louis.

Overall, in a close quarter fight, Louis would likely have the upper hand due to his extensive training and Enhanced Unarmed Combat ability. However, as with any fight, there are many factors that could influence the outcome, and the winner could ultimately be determined by their overall strategy and execution in the heat of the moment.

If Louis possessed all of the abilities you listed, he would be an incredibly formidable opponent with an extensive range of combat skills and abilities. His blocking mastery, enhanced defense, evading mastery, striking mastery and multi-strike abilities would make him hard to hit while allowing him to deliver powerful attacks.

His enhanced body, enhanced agility, enhanced lower leg strength, enhanced upper arm strength and enhanced combat/fighting skills would give him superior physical capabilities and combat proficiency.

Additionally, Louis's tactical analysis and tactical genius would allow him to quickly analyze a situation and develop a winning strategy. His supernatural unarmed combat and combat counterstrategy mastery would make him very difficult to defeat in one-on-one combat. 

If he also had the ability to manipulate strategies and tactics, his fighting instincts, auto-reflexes, and increased concentration capacity would heighten his agility, reaction time, and ability to make split-second decisions in battle. He would also be able to see through his opponent's tactics and defense, enabling him to counter moves that they try to use against him.

With all these abilities, it would be challenging for any opponent, including Leo Kasper, to defeat Louis in close-quarters combat. Louis would be able to fluidly and efficiently incorporate his supernatural abilities into his fighting style, making him a highly lethal opponent capable of overwhelming even the most skilled fighters.

Martial Arts Mastery, Mixed Martial Arts Mastery, Melee Fighter, Supernatural Arts Specialist, Strategy Manipulation, Counterstrategy Mastery, Enhanced Accuracy, Power Weaponry, Enhanced Weapon Proficiency, Cosmic Entity Physiology) vs. Leo Kasper (Manhunt 2)

In this scenario, Louis would have a considerable advantage over Leo Kasper due to his extensive range of combat skills and supernormal abilities. Leo Kasper may have superior aggression and unpredictability, but in terms of pure combat skill and strategy, Louis would have the upper hand. 

Louis's blocking mastery, enhanced defense, evading mastery, striking mastery, and multi-strike capabilities would allow him to avoid or deflect many of Leo's attempted attacks and deliver powerful counter-strikes. His enhanced body, enhanced agility, enhanced lower leg strength, enhanced upper arm strength, and enhanced combat/fighting skills would give him an edge in physical combat.

Additionally, Louis's tactical analysis and tactical genius would allow him to quickly analyze Leo's style, weaknesses and develop a winning strategy. His fighting instincts, auto-reflexes, flawless coordination, and enhanced accuracy would further enhance his agility, reaction time, and ability to respond to any situation in the battlefield.

Also, Louis's various supernatural combat abilities, such as enhanced mauling, judo mastery, and absolute unarmed combat would empower him with supernatural strength, speed, and agility which would make him a force to be reckoned with. Conversely, Leo would be at a disadvantage due to his lack of any formal training in martial arts or any supernatural abilities.

Overall, with Louis's extensive combat skills and supernatural abilities, he would be the clear winner in this match-up against Leo Kasper.
